CopyClip - Clipboard History Management Side Panel
A clipboard history tool that allows you to copy and paste from your clipboard history.

CopyClip is your essential Chrome extension for managing clipboard history with ease. Designed to alleviate the frustration of losing previously copied text, CopyClip logs and organizes your clipboard activity, allowing you to revisit and reuse any copied content effortlessly.

Never lose important copied text again! CopyClip addresses the common pain point of losing track of copied items. Whether you’re working on multiple documents, coding, researching, or managing extensive text, CopyClip ensures that all your copied items are just a click away, saving you time and boosting productivity.

Key Features:
---------------------------------------------
	•	Real-time Clipboard Logging: Continuously monitors and logs your clipboard content.
	•	Persistent Background Operation: Keeps logging clipboard content even when the side panel is not active.
	•	Comprehensive Clipboard History: Provides a chronological list of all copied text, making it easy to revisit and reuse.
	•	User-Friendly Interface: Simple and intuitive design for quick access and navigation.
	•	Includes a "Pin" options for frequently used clipboard items.
	•	Secure and Private: Logs clipboard content locally without sending data to external servers.


How It Works:
---------------------------------------------
	1.	Install CopyClip from the Chrome Web Store.
	2.	Click the CopyClip icon in the toolbar to open the side panel.
	3.	Copy any text, and CopyClip will automatically log and display it in real-time.
	4.	View your clipboard history in the side panel, allowing you to quickly find and reuse any copied item.


Data Privacy & Security
---------------------------------------------
Your clipboard data is not logged, saved, shared sent or used anywhere but by you.
Allows to copy, select, export HTML tables to Microsoft Excel, CSV, Google Sheets, etc

Table as CSV - Table Capture

ACTIVATE Extension: Purchase Subscribtion

Hot To Use: 
1.Go to website when you want to export or copy table
2.Click ctrl + right mouse click when you want select table then ctrl +c
3. If you want select random cells click alt + right mouse click then ctrl +c
4.To export table to csv, pdf, google sheets, image, jpeg, microsoft word, doc, clipboard.


Table as CSV - Table Capture is a powerful and versatile chrome extension that empowers you to interact with HTML tables on websites like never before. With this extension Table as CSV - Table Capture, you can effortlessly copy, select, and export HTML tables to various formats, including Microsoft Excel, CSV, Google Sheets, PDF, images, and more. Whether you need to analyze data with Table as CSV, share it with colleagues, or keep a local backup, this extension Table as CSV provides a seamless and user-friendly experience.

Key Features Table as CSV - Table Capture:

-Copy HTML tables with ease and efficiency
-Export tables as CSV to work with data in spreadsheet applications
-Capture tables as images (PNG, JPEG) or PDF for documentation and sharing
-Download tables directly as Excel spreadsheets or CSV files
-Save tables to your clipboard as Markdown for versatile use
-Export tables to Office 365 for further collaboration and integration
-Supports multi-page tables and dynamically loading tables
-Extract tables from PDF files, both local and from the web
Extension that allows you to interact with webpages and the browser using your voice and talon or your keyboard

Rango is an extension that helps you interact with web pages using your voice and talon. It does this by drawing hints with letters next to elements that you can use to click, hover, copy or show link addresses and more. It also helps you to close tabs, open a link in a new tab and open multiple link in new tabs without focusing them.

Vim for Google Docs: Supercharge Your Typing With Vim

Enhance your editing experience in Google Docs with Vim for the ultimate productivity boost. Many of your favorite Vim keybindings can now be used to traverse documents at lightning speed.

Key Features:
1. Remapping Support: Remap any key binding and even regular Google Docs shortcuts. Customize and tune the extension to your personal preferences.
2. Blazing Fast: Enjoy lightning quick text-editing and navigation. Built to be as performant as possible, ensuring a smooth experience.
3. Available Everywhere: Seamlessly move from device to device, with support for Windows, Mac, Linux, and available on Chrome and Firefox. Take Vim for Docs wherever you go.
4. Effortless Navigation: Navigate effortlessly with 5 different editing modes and hundreds of commands at your fingers. Become a Google Docs superuser and wizard in an instant.
5. Support & Updates: Caught on a snag, or have a feature request? We’re happy to help you out at support@vimfordocs.com. Enjoy software that keeps getting better, with more Vim keybindings and features always being added.

Vim for Google Docs is an independent extension and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Google Docs. By using the extension, you agree to the Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy, which can be found at vimfordocs.com.
SparX Wallet: your all-in-one tool for managing crypto assets via TVM networks.

Supported TVM networks: Tetra, TON and others.

FOR USERS
SparX Wallet is a Google Chrome extension that lets you manage your seed phrases, private and public keys, and wallets in a secure fashion without leaving your favorite browser.

Import existing keys or create new ones; 
Choose popular wallet contracts to use; 
Manage permissions you provide to dApps (DEXes, bridges, multisig wallets, etc.); 
Protect your data with encrypted local key storage.

Enjoy a new convenient interface with the same speed and security!

FOR DAPPS
SparX Wallet injects the RPC API object into every website’s DOM context so that the distributed applications can read from the blockchain and interact with smart contracts. Be it a decentralized exchange, browser game, cross-chain bridge, or multi-signature wallet, SparX Wallet will serve you as a lightweight, configurable, and reliable TVM blockchains.

PRIVACY AND PERMISSIONS
The extension does not and will not collect any data from you, so we will be grateful if you provide us your feedback in the Chrome store, on our Github page, Telegram chat, or send us an e-mail. See the “Useful links” section below.
However, it will require your permission to read and write to any webpage, as it enhances the functionality of the normal browser context. You can always view the source code of SparX Wallet on Github.

USEFUL LINKS

Website: https://sparxwallet.com/
Extension source code: https://github.com/broxus/sparx-wallet-browser-extension
Support chat in Telegram: https://t.me/broxus_chat
Contact us: https://broxus.com/

Screener.in to TradingView 📈

Renders plantuml code blocks directly on GitHub pages using the client-side TeaVM-compiled PlantUML engine.

PlantUML for GitHub

A Chrome extension that renders "plantuml" code blocks directly on GitHub pages, using the TeaVM-compiled PlantUML engine that runs entirely client-side.

Hosted at https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml-for-github

No server. No tokens. No tracking. Zero permissions.

HOW IT WORKS

1. The extension's content script scans every GitHub page for "plantuml" code blocks.
2. Each block is replaced with a sandboxed "<iframe>" packaged inside the extension.
3. The iframe loads the TeaVM-compiled "plantuml.js" engine and renders the diagram to SVG.
4. The result is displayed inline in the page, inside a small wrapper with a header bar.
5. The header bar shows a toggle button (top-left of the wrapper) that switches between the rendered diagram and the original PlantUML source. The source view uses GitHub's own syntax highlighting, so it looks exactly as it would without the extension installed.

This is the same architecture GitHub already uses for Mermaid — proving that client-side PlantUML can be integrated natively with zero infrastructure cost.


SECURITY AND PERMISSIONS

Minimal Permissions: It requires no host permissions, storage, or tabs API. The only declared permission is clipboardWrite, which is strictly used to power the user-triggered "Copy as Bitmap" button, allowing the generated diagram to be copied directly to the clipboard.

One thing worth calling out is the extension's Content Security Policy. The
Manifest V3 default CSP for extension pages is essentially "script-src 'self'",
which blocks WebAssembly. We need to relax it slightly to enable WebAssembly.

Why? PlantUML renders sequence diagrams directly to SVG, but anything that
needs graph layout — class, component, deployment, state, use-case, and
activity diagrams — is laid out by the embedded Graphviz engine, which
ships as a WebAssembly module (viz-global.js). Instantiating that module
requires the 'wasm-unsafe-eval' CSP source.

'wasm-unsafe-eval' is a narrowly scoped directive: despite the scary name,
it ONLY allows WebAssembly compilation and instantiation. It does NOT
re-enable "eval()" or "new Function()" — those remain blocked. No remote
scripts can be loaded either; "script-src 'self'" still applies. Google
documents this directive as the supported way to ship WASM in MV3 extensions.

In short: the engine runs entirely inside a sandboxed iframe with an opaque
origin, with no network access and no shared state with the host page.

ROADMAP

- [x] MVP: detect and render plantuml blocks
- [x] Firefox support (Manifest V3 is now supported in Firefox)
- [x] "Copy as Bitmap" buttons
- [x] Theme matching (light/dark) — follows GitHub's color mode
- [x] Support puml and wsd language aliases
- [ ] Options page (toggle, performance settings)
- [x] Chrome Web Store publication

WHY THIS EXTENSIONS EXISTS

PlantUML support on GitHub has been requested for 4+ years: https://github.com/orgs/community/discussions/10111

The main blocker was performance and infrastructure cost. With the TeaVM-compiled engine, that blocker no longer exists.
This extension demonstrates that PlantUML can run natively on GitHub.com with zero server-side changes — using the exact same sandbox pattern GitHub uses for Mermaid.

If you'd like to see this integrated natively, please upvote the discussion: https://github.com/orgs/community/discussions/10111


PRIVACY

Zero permissions. Zero tracking. Zero network requests.
Everything runs locally in a sandboxed iframe.

LINKS

Source code: https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml-for-github
Discussion:  https://github.com/orgs/community/discussions/10111

An app that makes it easy to extract the text you need from web pages.

📢 What's Text Picker

Text Picker는 웹 페이지에서 선택할 수 없는 텍스트를 쉽고 빠르게 추출할 수 있는 강력한 크롬 확장 앱입니다. 원하는 텍스트를 정확히 탐지하고, 직관적인 인터페이스를 통해 누구나 손쉽게 사용할 수 있습니다.

가이드 영역을 통해 원하는 텍스트를 정확히 찾아내고 복사할 수 있습니다. 예를 들어, 복사할 수 없는 웹 페이지의 기사 제목이나 중요한 데이터를 손쉽게 추출할 때 유용합니다.


✨ 주요 기능


1. 가이드 영역 선택
   - 텍스트 추출이 필요한 부분을 클릭하여 가이드 박스를 생성합니다.
   - 영역 크기와 위치를 간단히 조정할 수 있습니다.
2. 원클릭 텍스트 추출
   - [Copy Text] 버튼을 눌러 선택된 텍스트를 복사합니다.


🚀 사용 방법

1. Chrome 툴바에서 Text Picker 아이콘을 클릭합니다.
2. 마우스로 텍스트 추출 영역을 선택하고, 가이드 영역을 조정합니다.
3. [Copy Text] 버튼을 클릭해 텍스트를 복사합니다.
4. 작업이 끝나면 [Quit] 버튼을 눌러 종료합니다.


⚠️ 주의사항

- DOM 구조가 비정상적일 경우, 일부 텍스트를 제대로 탐지하지 못할 수 있습니다.


🔗 바로가기

- Chrome 웹 스토어 : https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/folgepnhffdkhbdhgclkjmhggijlngmi
- GitHub Repo : https://github.com/divlook/text-picker
- 의견 및 문의사항 : https://github.com/divlook/text-picker/discussions
Extract all texts from a Canva Design.

Introducing 'Extract Text for Canva' – Your Must-Have Canva Companion!

Unlock the potential of your Canva designs with our Chrome extension. Easily extract/copy all text from any Canva design and seamlessly paste it to your clipboard or convert it to CSV or JSON format. Here's what it enables you to do:

- **Content Reuse**: Effortlessly reuse Canva text content in other documents or platforms.
  
- **Content Analysis**: Analyze and optimize text content for marketing and content creation.

- **Translation**: Swiftly translate Canva text into multiple languages.

- **Data Entry**: Convert Canva text into structured data for seamless integration into databases.

- **Accessibility Compliance**: Make Canva designs more accessible with extracted text.

- **Presentation Creation**: Quickly add Canva text to your presentations.

- **Social Media Scheduling**: Schedule engaging social media posts with Canva content.

- **Market Research**: Gather insights by extracting text for analysis.

- **Education**: Facilitate learning with extracted text from educational materials.

- **Email Marketing**: Enhance your email campaigns with Canva-designed content.

And much more! Get started in seconds:

1. Go to Canva.com
2. Open your Canva design
3. Click on the extension icon
4. Choose Text, CSV, or JSON
5. Click 'Extract now!'
6. Confirm
7. Done!

IMPORTANT, PLEASE READ: *Currently works only with default Canva design format (or non-video editing format): the one with vertical scrolling pages. Click on "Scroll View" icon on the bottom-right corner of the screen.

Experience the convenience and efficiency of 'Extract Text for Canva.' Try it today and transform your Canva designs into powerful assets for your unique use cases.

Disclaimer: You acknowledge that the extension's functionality may be affected by external factors, such as changes in Canvas policy, which could prevent the extension from fully functioning. This is not the responsibility of the extension author.
Easily find and copy Squarespace CSS selectors to help customize your website

Squarestylist Selector Helper is the fastest way to find CSS selectors for your Squarespace website. Simply click any element, copy the CSS selector, and start styling with ease.

Perfect for:

Extracts the UPC code from a product page. Supports Walmart, Target, Best Buy, Lowes, Amazon, and Home Depot.

This extension allows the user to easily find the Universal Product Code (UPC) for any given item on the websites of major retailers. It will automatically pull the UPC upon loading a product page from a supported website, and it allows the user to re-pull the UPC if the value is lost or overwritten without refreshing the page. It also provides a "copy to clipboard" button for easy copy/paste functionality. 

NOTE: For Amazon, the ASIN is pulled in place of the UPC.

Supported retailers:
Walmart, Target, Best Buy, Lowes, Amazon, Home Depot, and more.

选中文本，点击图标，自动复制到粘贴板。可解除常见文档的禁止屏蔽，如钉钉、飞书等。
Browser DevTools extension for modelling web pages for automation.

The Page Modeller extension enables developers to scan a web page and generate page object style code for various tools, languages and frameworks and test the UI locators in the browser.

Currently supported tools and languages are:

* Selenium WebDriver Java
* Selenium WebDriver C#
* Puppeteer
* Robot Framework
* Protractor
* Protractor TypeScript

Feel free to propose new functionality and additional frameworks here: https://github.com/danhumphrey/page-modeller/issues

This extension is being actively developed and is considered a beta release.
국회인터넷의사중계시스템에서 AI자막을 저장하고 관리하는 확장 기능입니다. 자막 검색, 중요 표시, 자동 저장 기능을 제공합니다.

## Assembly Webcast Subtitle Saver
국회 인터넷의사중계시스템 AI 자막을 저장합니다.

### 주요 기능
* 복사
* 최근 5줄 복사
* 텍스트 파일로 저장 및 복구
* 자막 자동 저장
* 기록된 자막 검색
* 검색된 자막만 복사
* 현재 영상 캡처 

### 단축키
**중요 표시**
자막을 'Shift + 더블클릭'하거나 자막을 선택(블록 설정)한 상태에서 'Shift + q'를 누르면 '중요 표시'가 됩니다.
**발언자 표기**
자막을 'Shift + Alt + 더블클릭'하거나 자막을 선택한 상태에서 'Shift + s' 키를 누르면 발언자를 표기할 수 있습니다.

**해제 방법**
중요 표시나 발언자 표기는 적용할 때와 같은 방식으로 해제할 수 있습니다.

**주의**
캡스락이 켜진 경우 단축키가 작동하지 않습니다.

### 안내
* 개인이 제작한 확장기능입니다.
* 국회 인터넷의사중계시스템과 **무관**합니다.

Block all pictures and prompts from a user in game. Simply click their name in the list of players to hide or show their content.

Stream safer and moderate faster in Gartic Phone.

This extension is a streaming and moderation toolkit built for hosts and creators who need tighter control during live games. The main feature lets you block drawings and text from individual players, especially during album reveals, so your stream stays protected while other players still see normal game content on their own screens.

>> Core moderation features:

- Per-player blocking for drawings and text in reveal/book mode.
- Hide-all and show-all controls for instant global moderation.
- Safe Mode that auto-hides content at reveal starts and during draw/write turns.
- In-game off-stream preview panel for hidden content.
- External pop-out preview window for second monitor or OBS workflows.
- Prompt and reference drawing blocking during active turns.

>> Media and workflow tools:

- One-click PNG downloads for individual drawings.
- WEBM downloads for drawing process reveals.
- Batch download for all drawings in an album.
- Quick utility actions for lobby invite and moderation links.

>> Twitch-integrated control:

- Real-time Twitch channel connection for chat-driven moderation.
- Viewer and host/mod command support for ready checks, approvals, and marking players.
- Visual player highlighting for blocked players, failed ready checks, first-time players, marked players, and newer accounts.
- Players-in-game panel for live room visibility and status context.

>> Customization and advanced controls:

- Custom censor image pool for blocked content.
- Custom background images by game phase.
- Configurable keybinds and quality-of-life stream controls.
A Chrome extension to prevent class duplication when pasting in Webflow.

🚀 Introducing xSync: Revolutionize Your Webflow workflow!

A Chrome extension to prevent class duplication when pasting in Webflow.

Leave behind the hurdles of duplicating classes. Let xSync handle it for you, empowering you to focus and complete what you started.

Effortless Organization, Flawless Execution

xSync eliminates the hassle of duplication and disarray, ensuring your projects are perfectly synchronized every step of the way. No more duplicated classes or disconnected variables – with xSync, your workflow becomes as smooth as silk.

How It Works:

1. Installation Made Easy: Get started by installing the xSync Chrome Extension – the first step towards an exciting experience.

2. Accessible Anywhere: Pin xSync to your toolbar for quick and easy access whenever you need it.

3. Activate with Ease: Toggle the switch in your toolbar to activate xSync and unleash its full potential.

4. Precision Copying: Seamlessly copy elements from Webflow Project A with pinpoint accuracy.

5. Effortless Merging: Merge worlds effortlessly by pasting elements into Webflow Project B with pasting it.

6. Experience the Magic: Watch as everything aligns perfectly with the "syncing" message – it's like magic for your workflow!

Homepage : https://xsync.webflow.io/
Follow on X : https://twitter.com/xAtomTeam
Shows today's date in the Badíʿ (Wondrous) calendar, the official calendar of the Bahá'í Faith.

This extension displays the date in the Badíʿ (Wondrous) calendar where you are, automatically determining sunset times. Days in the Badíʿ calendar start and end at sunset.

The icon in the toolbar is subtle but keeps you informed of the current date in the Badíʿ calendar. By clicking on the icon, more detailed information is shown. Some things you can view or do:

- Copy the current date in a variety of formats, for use in other places.

- View the Badíʿ date for any day of any year - what was the date on your birthday?

- Set reminders before/after sunrise and sunset. Have your computer announce them out loud!

- View a list of dates for upcoming Feasts and Holy Days.

- View a full calendar (in Gregorian or Badíʿ layout) appropriate for printing.

- View the Fast times for your location.

- Export an iCal file with Badíʿ dates, for import into any calendar system.

- Get a list of special dates for planning years into the future.

- Design your own custom date formats.

- Trigger IFFF actions or Zapier webhooks according to Badíʿ dates or sunrise/set times.

See the website linked below for complete details and history.

Please view the Support tab and submit Suggestions on how this extension could be improved! If you can help translate the extension into your language, please let me know! Current languages are shown below.

Author: Glen Little (Calgary, Canada)

Bitgreen's Browser Wallet is a web extension to manage your keys and addresses in the Bitgreen ecosystem. 

The Bitgreen blockchain enables everyday people to participate in activities that create a better world, such as renewable energy, carbon credits, the Habbit Game, and more. The Bitgreen native wallet can be used to hold and transfer "BBB" network tokens and other Web3 tokens built using the Substrate SDK for the Polkadot and Kusama ecosystems. This browser wallet is developed, tested, distributed, and maintained by the Bitgreen Switzerland Association and its members, for the benefit of users who wish to access decentralized applications featured on the Bitgreen blockchain network.

331 W Main St Ste 407

Extension to easy play Slither.io with friends

Hello, buddy!

Do you want to play slither.io with friends on the same server, but don’t know how? This Google extension will help you do just that!

Please watch the video above where I show how to use the extension.

Enjoy the game with your friends!

***

Also this extension provides some useful features such as:
- nickname remembering
Extension enables training sharing. Share training via email, facebook or any chat platform due to using stringified JSON format.

Want to share your workout with friends?
- Just pick one you want to share and click on share icon. Training is copied to clipboard/console and you can share it via pasting it anywhere you wish.

You want to import training?
- Just copy training to your clipboard (ctrl+c) and click to Import in Workout submenu. Then chose what is going to happen. Only import? Or rather import and send to desired device? As you wish!

Do you want to help me with locale for your language? I will be glad for any help and opinion.
